name: Waiting Area
description:
Whew!  What a long climb.  You look around, and notice you are almost to the
top of the tree.  Here the tree starts to thin, and almost starts to look like
a normal tree.  This place seems to be some kind of waiting area for people
waiting to see the Lady and Lord of Lothlorien.  To the west you see a
checkpoint of some kind.  You also see the top of a ladder going down.
